verdict.answer_first: B states the recommendation immediately: "Recommended default: Server-Sent Events (SSE) for in-app, Web Push for background"; A starts with caveat and then a transport table before the recommendation.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits cleanly: "SSE is the right default" and "Web Push...is additive"; A surveys more options first, though it later recommends SSE + Web Push.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on right now because it gives concrete phases, endpoint examples, data models, and architecture: "GET /notifications/stream", "GET /notifications?unread=1", "POST /notifications/:id/read".
